meaning: n.[希神]九头怪蛇,难以根除之祸害,[动]水螅
examples: He stands there panting, just out of range of the hydra heads.
Hydra IRC, an open source chat client, is quickly gaining a stellar reputation.
Adobe labs describes Hydra as a, “high-performance image processing language.”
Aaron Turner launched Hydra Head Records in 1995 without much of a plan.
It was on a night in 1968, during my first long sojourn on Hydra.
